rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"New public APIs (`composeWithSkip`, `skipMerged`) were unit-tested but never wired to any production call site — integration must be verified explicitly.","scope":"src/validation/compose.ts"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Unit tests alone are insufficient; a feature needs at least one integration test showing it wired to an actual production code path.","scope":"testing"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Extended existing `retry-queue.ts` with `skipMerged`/`isMerged`/`unskipMerged` rather than creating a new module, keeping state co-located with the queue logic.","scope":"src/utils/retry-queue.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Branches are identified by target ID; `skipMerged` uses a `Set<string>` keyed on target ID to track which branches have been merged.","scope":"compose retry"}]}
